subtitle: Step by Step
title: Your Journey at the Summer School

steps.title: Discover & Apply
steps.subtitle: step 01
body: Browse through our programme domains, check eligibility and dates, and fill out the registration form (Google Form).
Early applications are encouraged as seats are limited per batch.

steps.title: Get Confirmed
steps.subtitle: step 02
body: Once your application is reviewed, you'll receive a confirmation email with your batch details, domain allocation, and venue information.
Any pre-reads or prep material will be shared so you are ready from day one.

steps.title: Attend & Engage
steps.subtitle: step 03
body: Show up for your assigned sessions, participate in hands-on labs, attend keynote talks, and collaborate with fellow participants.
Maintain minimum attendance to qualify for certification.

steps.title: Earn Your Certificate
steps.subtitle: step 04
body: Complete the required assignments and attendance criteria to qualify.
IEEE Student Members may be eligible for additional recognition and credit transfer benefits.
